cadence_note: data.ed.gov is a CKAN portal with no fixed publication calendar: packages are historical snapshots (CRDC collections, IPEDS/EDGE releases, annual Pell/FSA reports) that are restated irregularly rather than on a schedule. New packages and resource revisions surface via CKAN metadata_modified. Monthly re-collection tracks portal additions without re-pulling ~15 GB of stable historical resources more often than the source actually changes.
